mapper.insert: insert into delivery_address (user_id, is_default, name, phone, region_id, address, location, create_time) values (#{data.userId}, #{data.isDefault}, #{data.name}, #{data.phone}, #{data.regionId}, #{data.address}, #{data.location}, #{data.createTime})
mapper.update: update delivery_address set is_default = 0 where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1

update delivery_address
is_default = #{data.isDefault},
`name` = #{data.name},
phone = #{data.phone},
region_id = #{data.regionId},
address = #{data.address},
location = #{data.location},
where id = #{data.id}
mapper.select: select da.id as id, da.user_id as user_id, da.is_default as is_default, da.name as name, da.phone as phone, da.region_id as region_id, da.address as address, da.location as location, da.create_time as create_time, da.update_time as update_time from delivery_address da where da.user_id = #{userId} order by da.is_default desc, da.id asc
